---
title: "‘A Lutheran First Communion: Extract from a Diary Kept During a Residence in Germany’"
---

## ‘A Lutheran First Communion: Extract from a Diary Kept During a Residence in Germany’

**Author:** M. M.
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> 30 (November 1865) 544.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
